block_04: Traders paida nahi hotay unhen banaya jata hai.Is Summers main pata lagay ga kay sub say bhetreen Trader kun hay kiyun kay hum is tournament ki maizbani kar rehe hain Aik bhuat vishal tournmament ki series siraf Asian traders kay liey. Pooray Asia main say 4 muft tournaments main say jo jeetay ga who akhri tournament main jaga bana paye ga $5,000 kay inaam kay sath!
